visual_description: The audio is dominated by a tense and dramatic orchestral score. A close-up shot focuses on a man with a concerned expression, wearing large black headphones and a light-colored collared shirt. He is in a dimly lit environment, possibly a control room, with a computer monitor partially visible in the foreground. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The music is fast-paced and suspenseful, with a driving rhythm and a sense of urgency, creating a high-stakes, action-movie atmosphere. The camera cuts to a man in a dark suit sitting in the back of a car at night. He looks to his left with a serious expression. The interior of the car is dark, with the blurry lights of the city visible through the windows. The same white Chinese characters, "风行网," appear in the top left corner. A bright, horizontal blue light streak, like a lens flare or a digital effect, sweeps across the frame, momentarily obscuring the man. The camera angle remains on the man in the suit in the back of the car.
